audit_items.proof_trace: All free operations in ae_epoll.c are followed immediately by function returns (aeApiCreate error paths) or are the terminal statements in aeApiFree; freed pointers are never accessed again in the same scope. zrealloc in aeApiResize calls abort() on failure via the OOM handler, so it never silently returns NULL and produces no dangling pointer. No double-free exists because aeApiCreate error paths and aeApiFree are mutually exclusive owners of state/state->events.
